proposition: Independent research found no register or address overlap between Lukáš Grolig (Able's marketed CTO) and the Able.cz/Znojmo cluster in any of his own companies (BGO s.r.o. — terminated, Usporix s.r.o. — 25%, VERASTO s.r.o.), reinforcing that his CTO title is a marketing role only.

statusExplanation: Podpořeno více nezávisle vzniklými rodinami zdrojů. Pozor: dvě zrcadla téže autority nejsou nezávislé potvrzení.

sources.title: Czech commercial register — aggregator mirror search (kurzy.cz, rejstrik-firem)

supersededReason: Mixed three company observations with an analytical conclusion, and two details were wrong in the mirrors (Usporix is 100 % Grolig-held via four 25 % units and was founded 26 Jun 2026; VERASTO is confirmed 100 % + jednatel, not 'role unconfirmed'). Split and primary-sourced 2026-07-18.
